phase_history.notes: Granular texture processor — 15 parameters, 6s circular buffer, JUCE 8 WebView UI, Dattorro plate reverb, density sync, freeze, per-grain randomization attenuators.

Grain engine: 32-grain pool, cubic size curve (absSize^3), tanh normalization, additive feedback model. Reverb: Dattorro plate — 4 input diffusors (APF), 2 cross-coupled tank arms (APF+DL+LP+decay), 8-tap stereo output. WebView: 800x550 WKWebView, BinaryData index.html.
Session 3 UI overhaul: TIME/SIZE/SHAPE left cluster, DENSITY hero at 440px (270deg arc, 100px), PITCH at 660px, grain viz arc, Shift+click atten rings, VU meters, output section. SVG knobs.

Sessions 1-2: grain engine, additive feedback, cubic size curve, density sync PPQ fallback. Session 3: UI overhaul. Session 4: Schroeder APF root-cause fix (out = -g*in + (1-g^2)*delayed, true |H|=1), decay capped at 0.78 (0.5+amount*0.28), tanh(wet*0.4f) soft-clip output. Reverb stable 0-100%.

framework_selection.rationale: JUCE 8 WebView (WKWebView on macOS) for rich SVG UI: 15 parameters with atten rings, grain visualization arc, stereo VU meters, Shift+click attenuator mode. All assets inline in index.html via juce_add_binary_data. 800x550 window.
